title: Bulk Refresh Missing Object Meta Fields on Dictionary Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to bulk refresh all objects missing metadata fields in one click, so that I don't have to refresh each object individually.
description:
Add a "Bulk Refresh Missing Meta Fields" button to the dictionary page that refreshes all objects with missing associated metadata fields in a single action.

### Behavior
- Button is only visible when at least two objects are missing meta fields
- On click, button disables and shows progress (e.g., "1/25 refreshed", "2/25 refreshed")
- Also available via select-rows action for targeted bulk refresh
acceptance_criteria: Bulk Refresh button appears when 2+ objects have missing meta fields
Progress indicator shows count of refreshed objects
Button disables during refresh to prevent duplicate requests
Select-rows version allows targeted bulk refresh
ux_changes: Bulk Refresh Missing Meta Fields button with progress indicator. Also available via row selection.
middleware_changes: Batch refresh logic that iterates through objects missing meta fields and refreshes each sequentially.
implementation_notes: Deployed to dev and production. Progress counter updates after each object refresh completes.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the bulk refresh button with progress indicator. Also added a select-rows version. Deployed to dev and production.
